mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.brand_id, d.brand_name, d.product_name, d.product_url, d.product_attributes, d.remark, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, d.is_delete, (SELECT COALESCE( JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'typeId', type_data.category_type_id, 'list', COALESCE( ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'level', cc.LEVEL, 'categoryId', cc.category_id, 'categoryName', cc.category_name, 'categoryEnName', sub_c.category_en_name ) ) FROM kol_product_category cc LEFT JOIN kol_category sub_c ON cc.category_id = sub_c.id WHERE cc.product_id = type_data.product_id AND cc.category_type_id = type_data.category_type_id AND cc.is_delete = 0 ), JSON_ARRAY() ) ) ), JSON_ARRAY() ) FROM ( SELECT product_id, category_type_id, MIN(id) as min_id FROM kol_product_category WHERE is_delete = 0 GROUP BY product_id, category_type_id ) type_data WHERE type_data.product_id = d.id ) AS dataList FROM kol_product d LEFT JOIN kol_product_category pc ON d.id = pc.product_id AND a.brand_id = b.brand_id AND pc.is_delete = 0 LEFT JOIN kol_category tc ON pc.category_id = tc.id AND tc.is_delete = 0 WHERE d.is_delete = 0
AND d.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kolProductModel.productName}, '%')
AND d.brand_id = #{kolProductModel.brandId}
AND d.product_url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kolProductModel.productUrl}, '%')
AND (JSON_EXTRACT(d.product_attributes, '$.productModel') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kolProductModel.productAttributes}, '%') or JSON_EXTRACT(d.product_attributes, '$.size') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kolProductModel.productAttributes}, '%') or JSON_EXTRACT(d.product_attributes, '$.color') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kolProductModel.productAttributes}, '%'))
AND tc.category_code like CONCAT(#{kolProductModel.categoryCode}, '%')
GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY d.product_name , d.brand_name DESC

SELECT a.*, b.category_id, b.category_name FROM `kol_product` a LEFT JOIN kol_product_category b ON a.id = b.product_id AND a.brand_id = b.brand_id LEFT JOIN kol_category c on b.category_id = c.id
AND a.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kolProductModel.productName}, '%')
AND a.brand_id = #{kolProductModel.brandId}
AND a.product_url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kolProductModel.productUrl}, '%')
AND (JSON_EXTRACT(a.product_attributes, '$.productModel') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kolProductModel.productAttributes}, '%') or JSON_EXTRACT(a.product_attributes, '$.size') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kolProductModel.productAttributes}, '%') or JSON_EXTRACT(a.product_attributes, '$.color') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kolProductModel.productAttributes}, '%'))
AND c.id = #{kolProductModel.categoryId}
AND c.category_code_path like CONCAT(#{kolProductModel.categoryCode}, '%')
ORDER BY a.brand_name DESC,a.create_time DESC
select * from kol_product where brand_id = #{brandId} and is_delete = 0
